segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a cartoon medic wearing a green helmet marked with a red cross, screaming with an open mouth, set against a blurred battlefield backdrop. The text 'THE RULES OF WAR' appears prominently. The scene transitions to a tank’s perspective, with the text 'WAR CRIMES AGAINST MEDICS' overlaid, showing a war-torn landscape with fires and barbed wire. The next sequence shows a wounded medic in a green uniform with a red cross helmet, carrying a comrade through a war-damaged town with sandbags and barbed wire, passing storefronts labeled 'CREMERIE·EPICERIE FINE·FRUITERIE' and 'VINS·CAFE BAR·BIERE'. Two enemy soldiers in dark green uniforms and helmets shoot the medic, who collapses. The scene shifts to a formal dining room with red patterned wallpaper, where a man in 18th-century attire sits at a table with food and wine. The setting changes to a military camp with white tents, where a soldier in a red coat and tricorn hat stands with a rifle, while another soldier in a white uniform with a red sash stands nearby. The video then shows a duel between two officers—one in red and one in blue—on a grassy hill, with soldiers in the background. After the duel, they shake hands. The final scene shows a line of soldiers in white uniforms with black hats and red sashes, marching in formation across a green field with trees and hills in the background.

segments.caption: The video opens with a group of soldiers in 18th-century attire—white coats with red sashes, black tricorn hats adorned with white feathers—marching through a lush green field dotted with yellow flowers. The scene shifts to a lone soldier in similar attire taking aim and firing a musket at a distant enemy soldier in a red coat, who falls to the ground after being hit. The perspective then changes to a wooded area where a soldier in a grey coat with a feathered hat fires a rifle, guided by a man in a green coat with white hair, who appears to be an officer. The next sequence shows a red-coated officer on horseback, accompanied by two soldiers in red coats and white breeches, moving through the forest. The scene transitions to an open field under a cloudy sky, where the same red-coated officer and his two soldiers are now on horseback, facing a line of soldiers in dark blue uniforms with white cross-belts and black tricorn hats. The blue-uniformed soldiers open fire, and the red-coated officer and his men are shot down, falling from their horses. The final frames show a close-up from behind a soldier in a brown coat, holding a musket, as he fires at the advancing blue-uniformed soldiers, who continue to advance despite casualties. The atmosphere shifts from calm to intense combat, with the environment changing from a peaceful meadow to a dense forest and then to a desolate battlefield under overcast skies.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with a dramatic scene of a WWII battlefield, where a Medic in a green uniform with a red cross helmet is tending to a Wounded Soldier (WWII) lying on the ground, while an Enemy Soldier in dark green uniform aims a rifle at them. A large green checkmark briefly overlays the scene, suggesting a moment of approval or correctness. The scene transitions to a ruined building where the Medic, now wearing a white helmet with a red cross and a white armband, is surrounded by several Enemy Soldiers who are holding rifles and raising their hands in surrender. The Medic stands calmly in the center, overseeing the captives. The setting then shifts to an open battlefield with tanks and explosions in the background, where soldiers carry a wounded comrade on a stretcher through the chaos. The final sequence takes place inside a damaged building, where the Medic is again attending to the Wounded Soldier (WWII) when two Enemy Soldiers enter and open fire. The Medic raises their hands in surrender, but one Enemy Soldier kneels to check the wounded soldier, while the other continues to aim. Suddenly, the Medic draws a pistol and shoots the kneeling Enemy Soldier, who falls. The Medic then turns and fires at the remaining Enemy Soldier, who also falls, leaving the Medic standing over the fallen enemies with the wounded soldier still on the floor.

segments.caption: The video begins with a first-person perspective from inside a military aircraft cockpit, looking out through a framed canopy at a clear blue sky. A distant enemy aircraft is spotted and tracked as it flies across the frame. The pilot engages, firing a weapon that results in an explosion and the enemy plane disintegrating into smoke and debris, followed by a parachute descending. The scene then cuts to a sniper’s scope view in a dense jungle environment, where two enemy soldiers in dark green uniforms are seen behind sandbags. The sniper, camouflaged in the foliage, takes aim and fires, hitting one of the soldiers. The camera then shifts to a wider view of the jungle battlefield, showing the sniper in full view, crouched and firing his rifle. The final shot reveals the enemy soldiers behind the sandbag barricade, one of whom is now wounded and falling, while the other continues to fire. The setting is a tropical jungle with lush greenery, barbed wire, and sandbag fortifications, suggesting a WWII-era combat scenario.

segments.caption: The video opens with a jungle battlefield scene where three Enemy Soldiers in dark green uniforms and helmets are positioned behind sandbags, firing rifles. The setting is dense with tropical foliage, barbed wire, and sandbag fortifications, indicating a defensive position. The scene transitions to a different jungle environment where soldiers in similar green uniforms advance through the terrain, taking cover behind large rocks and engaging in combat; one soldier is shown falling after being hit. The narrative then shifts to a formal portrait of an older man in a beige suit, wearing glasses and the Medal of Honor, standing before an American flag, suggesting a moment of recognition or reflection. The scene changes again to a military camp with green tents, supply crates, and a field hospital tent marked with a red cross. Suddenly, a Japanese Zero fighter plane (marked with '3-257' and a red circle) flies overhead and drops a bomb, causing an explosion and black smoke. Soldiers scramble for cover as the camp is attacked. The final sequence depicts a chaotic battlefield with explosions, burning palm trees, and multiple soldiers lying wounded or dead on the ground, some with visible bloodstains, while a medic in a green uniform with a red cross patch rushes to aid the injured amidst the destruction. The atmosphere is intense, with smoke, fire, and the aftermath of aerial bombardment dominating the scene.

segments.caption: The video opens with a chaotic jungle battlefield where the Medic, identifiable by the red cross on his arm, rushes through explosions and fire to tend to wounded soldiers lying amidst debris and burning vegetation. The scene transitions to a historical battle on a grassy hill, where a Red-Coated Soldier and a White-Uniformed Soldier duel with swords before engaging in a broader conflict with Blue-Uniformed Soldiers firing muskets. The Red-Coated Soldier is later shown being thrown from a horse during combat. The narrative shifts to a modern battlefield with a first-person view from a tank, firing at enemy positions behind barbed wire and sandbags, with explosions and smoke filling the background. A title card appears: 'THE RULES OF WAR ILLEGAL ACTS IN WARFARE', featuring a soldier in a blue UN beret. The scene changes to a soldier in camouflage reading a 'RULES OF WAR POCKET EDITION' book at a wooden desk in a classroom-like setting. The video then cuts to a trench warfare scene with soldiers in blue uniforms firing rifles from sandbagged positions. Next, a street in a European town is shown under attack, with civilians fleeing as a soldier fires a submachine gun; buildings labeled 'Café de Normandie' and 'Pharmacie Pelletier' are damaged. The Medic is then seen kneeling beside a wounded soldier in a ruined building, only to be shot by an enemy soldier in a tan uniform. The final scene shows modern soldiers in desert camouflage advancing through a town, with one being shot and falling, while others continue forward under fire.

segments.caption: The video begins with a collage of six scenes depicting protected entities under the rules of war: a civilian being confronted by soldiers, a hospital with a red cross, soldiers interacting with civilians, a doctor examining a patient, a train carrying civilians, and a medical facility. This transitions to a tank moving through a cityscape, passing a hospital, a church, and a classical building resembling the Colosseum, before reaching a factory and the Statue of Liberty, symbolizing civilian infrastructure. The factory is then shown exploding with fire and smoke, overlaid with a red 'X', indicating it is an invalid target. The scene shifts to a living room where a man in a green vest watches a TV showing soldiers in combat; soldiers in camouflage enter, point guns at him, and one shoots the TV, which then turns into a tank. The man is then escorted by military police (MPs) out of the room. The final scene shows a museum being bombed, with smoke and fire erupting, and civilians fleeing; a large red 'X' appears over the burning museum, reinforcing its status as a protected, invalid target. The narrative emphasizes the sanctity of civilian and cultural sites under the rules of war, using visual metaphors and symbolic overlays to convey the message.

segments.caption: The video opens with a classical-style building labeled 'MUSEUM', fortified with sandbags, barbed wire, and military equipment on its roof, including a tank and crates. Soldiers in green uniforms run toward the entrance, and a large red 'X' appears over the scene, indicating the museum is an invalid target. The scene transitions to a battlefield with burning wreckage and black smoke, marked with a green checkmark, signifying a legal act of war. Next, a journalist wearing a blue 'PRESS' helmet and vest stands in front of a stone wall, observing soldiers in green uniforms firing rifles in a desert landscape; one soldier is shot and falls. The journalist gestures, and the scene shifts to a field hospital tent where doctors in white coats and a clergy member in white robes tend to wounded soldiers. Suddenly, soldiers in tan uniforms with rifles enter the tent and open fire, killing the medical personnel and clergy. The final scene shows two soldiers in tan uniforms with red crosses on their helmets and arms, walking calmly past a sandbagged bunker, indicating their protected status as medics under the rules of war.

segments.caption: The video opens with a scene of a WWII-era field hospital in a European town, featuring a beige tent marked with a red cross, an olive-green ambulance with a white star and red cross, and three Medics in green uniforms with red cross patches on their arms and helmets. The setting includes buildings labeled 'Cafe de Normandie' and 'Pharmacie Pelletier', with barbed wire in the foreground. A tank appears behind the ambulance, and an Enemy Soldier in a dark green uniform fires a rifle from the right. The scene transitions to a forest where a Wounded Soldier (WWII) lies on the ground, and a Medic rushes to him, lifts him onto his back, and carries him away. An Enemy Soldier emerges and fires, hitting the Medic, who falls. The scene shifts to a war-torn street with burning buildings and barbed wire, where the Medic, now in a tan uniform, drags a fallen comrade through the flames. A red circle highlights the Medic’s rifle, then a green checkmark appears, followed by a red 'X' as the rifle changes to a bazooka, indicating a violation of the rules of war. The Medic continues dragging the wounded soldier through the chaos.

segments.caption: The video opens with a Parachuting Soldier in a tan uniform and yellow vest descending under a beige parachute against a blue sky with scattered clouds. A burning Japanese Zero Fighter Plane, emitting black smoke, flies nearby, suggesting an aerial combat scenario. The scene then transitions to a war-torn urban environment with autumnal trees and rubble, where a group of soldiers in camouflage uniforms with red crosses on their arms and helmets—identified as Tan-Uniformed Soldiers—march forward with rifles, some raising white flags. The text 'FAKING SURRENDER AND PERFIDY' appears prominently, indicating a thematic focus on deceptive wartime tactics. The scene shifts to a ruined building with snow-covered ground, where Enemy Soldiers in dark green uniforms and helmets, some in white winter coats, emerge from a doorway, raising their hands in surrender. However, they are ambushed by soldiers in tan uniforms with red crosses, who shoot them as they advance. The narrative continues inside the damaged building, where the Enemy Soldiers, still pretending to surrender, are suddenly attacked by the Tan-Uniformed Soldiers, who open fire, causing casualties. The scene cuts back to the autumnal battlefield, where the Tan-Uniformed Soldiers continue their advance, some falling, while others maintain their formation, reinforcing the theme of perfidy and the breakdown of trust in combat. The environment shifts between urban ruins and open fields, emphasizing the chaos and moral ambiguity of war.

segments.caption: The video opens with a group of soldiers in camouflage uniforms and helmets, armed with rifles, advancing through an autumnal battlefield with burning trees and a smoldering tank in the background, suggesting a recent engagement. The scene transitions to a UN Soldier in a blue beret and camouflage uniform standing before a barred door, with the bold white text 'UNIFORMS, ESPIONAGE AND SYMBOLS' overlaid, introducing the thematic focus. The final scene shows a man in a trench coat and fedora, holding a pistol, standing on a city street corner as a soldier in camouflage runs past, suggesting espionage or covert operations in an urban setting.

segments.caption: The video begins in a ruined building interior, where a soldier in a green uniform (Medic) is tending to a wounded comrade lying on the floor, while another soldier in green (Enemy Soldier) kneels and fires a rifle through a broken wall. A soldier in a tan uniform with a white star on the helmet (Enemy Soldier in Tan Uniform) enters through a doorway, firing at the child soldiers, causing one to fall. The scene transitions to a war-torn urban environment where a soldier in a tan uniform (Tan-Uniformed Soldier) points at a surrendering soldier in a grey uniform (Enemy Soldier) flanked by two other tan-uniformed soldiers, indicating an execution. The next scene shows a soldier in a green uniform (Soldier in Green Uniform) standing against a stone wall, facing two tan-uniformed soldiers with rifles, which is then marked with a large red 'X', symbolizing an illegal act. The video then shifts to a suburban street where soldiers in green camouflage (Modern Soldiers) confront civilians, including a man in a yellow shirt and a man in a green vest (Man in Green Vest), who are forced to the ground. The scene changes to a dimly lit basement where a civilian man in a white tank top is suspended by chains, being electrocuted by two soldiers in camouflage (Modern Soldiers). Finally, the video shows a group of civilians, including the man in the green vest and a woman in a red top, being forced to carry large metal shields while being escorted by a soldier in camouflage (Modern Soldier) down a narrow alleyway, suggesting forced labor or protection under duress. The overall tone is grim, emphasizing war crimes and violations of the rules of war, with visual cues like red 'X's and text overlays reinforcing the illegality of the actions depicted.

segments.caption: The video opens with a bright, golden sun partially obscured by clouds, transitioning into a hazy, warm-toned sky. The scene shifts to a war-torn urban environment with damaged buildings and rubble, where two soldiers in green camouflage uniforms are firing rifles, with smoke and debris visible. The text 'CHEMICAL WEAPONS AND POISONS' appears prominently. The setting changes to a trench warfare scene with soldiers in blue uniforms firing from sandbagged trenches, as a green gas cloud spreads across the battlefield, causing the soldiers to collapse. The scene then transitions to a city street where protesters hold signs reading 'SLOW DOWN FAST FOOD' and 'WHAT AN APOCALYPSE', facing riot police with shields. A large green checkmark overlays the scene, indicating approval or legality. The video returns to the urban combat scene with soldiers firing, then cuts to a black background featuring a brown bottle labeled 'STRYCHNINE' with a skull and crossbones. A red 'X' appears over the bottle, followed by two bullets with blue tips, which are also marked with red 'X's, symbolizing the banning of these weapons. segments.caption: The video begins in a lush forest where a bright yellow explosion erupts, suggesting a sudden detonation. The scene transitions to a soldier in desert camouflage firing a large shoulder-mounted weapon that emits a red laser beam across a barren desert landscape. The next sequence shows a man in traditional white attire and a headscarf, standing on a rooftop in a war-torn village, aiming binoculars—then being struck by a red laser beam and collapsing. The video then cuts to a soldier operating a tripod-mounted laser device in the desert, targeting distant figures. Two enemy combatants in white and grey attire walk across the sand, one of them being hit by a red laser beam and falling. The final frame displays bold text: 'EXPANDING AND EXPLODING BULLETS', accompanied by an illustration of a bullet with a flame, signaling a shift to a new topic on banned munitions. The environment transitions from forest to desert, then to a ruined village, emphasizing a progression of combat scenarios and the use of advanced weaponry.

segments.caption: The video begins with a soldier in a grey uniform and helmet, equipped with a flamethrower, advancing through a trench warfare environment lined with sandbags, wooden crates, and barbed wire. The soldier directs a stream of fire from the flamethrower, engulfing enemy positions in flames and smoke, creating a chaotic and destructive atmosphere. The scene then transitions to a lush tropical jungle with palm trees and dense greenery, where a military aircraft flies overhead. Suddenly, the jungle erupts in massive explosions and fires, indicating an aerial bombardment. The next sequence shows a fighter jet in flight, releasing a cluster bomb. The bomb is depicted in detail as it descends, deploying numerous smaller submunitions that scatter across the sky. The submunitions then rain down on a fortified cityscape with stone walls and towers, causing widespread explosions and billowing black smoke, signifying the devastating impact of the cluster bomb on the urban environment. The visual narrative emphasizes the destructive power and indiscriminate nature of such weapons, shifting from ground-based flamethrower attacks to aerial cluster bombing, highlighting different forms of warfare and their environmental and structural consequences.
